mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'
AND HM.NAME_KR LIKE #{keyword}
ORDER BY HM.ID ASC

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.CLASSICAL = 'false'
AND HM.NAME_KR LIKE #{keyword}
ORDER BY HM.ID ASC

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true' AND HM.CLASSICAL = 'false'
ORDER BY HM.ID ASC

SELECT HM.ID, HM.NAME_JP, HM.NAME_KR, HM.LINK, HM.UPDATED_TIME, HM.UPDATED_USER, HM.LYRIC, HM.VISIBLE_FLG, HM.CLASSICAL FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'
ORDER BY HM.ID ASC

SELECT MAX(HM.UPDATED_TIME) FROM HYMNS HM
HM.VISIBLE_FLG = 'true'
